meta.notes: Finnish household electricity — average for "< 1,000 kWh" annual consumption, from Statistics Finland (Tilastokeskus), StatFin table 13rb. All-in 30.54 c/kWh = electric energy 10.72 + distribution 11.36 + taxes (electricity tax + VAT) 8.46. Licensed CC BY 4.0 — attribute Statistics Finland. A statistical average, not a shoppable plan. Period 2026M03.
